message:
fix(ft-api): tensor_diag_embed autograd via apply_function with diagonal-extraction backward [bd-d180]

tensor_diag_embed used to extract values, build the embedded matrix
in plain f64, and rebuild a requires_grad=false leaf — same
severed-autograd pattern fixed under frankentorch-1tax.

Forward is purely linear in the input — output[row, col] = input[i]
when (row, col) lies on the requested diagonal, 0 otherwise. So
the backward is just the inverse extraction:
    grad_input[i] = grad_output[row, col]
for the same (row, col) the forward used.

Wrap in tensor_apply_function with this analytical backward.
The offset sign and abs_offset are captured via closure (Copy by
move).

Adds diag_embed_propagates_gradient_via_diagonal_extraction
regression test. Uses a weighted-sum loss against a 3x3 weight
matrix so the gradient grad[i] = weights[i, i] varies per index,
which catches (row, col) routing bugs that wouldn't surface under
a uniform sum loss. Input [1, 2, 3] gets gradient [1, 5, 9] which
is the main diagonal of the [[1..9]] weight matrix.

Closes frankentorch-d180. ft-api lib tests: 1145 passing (+1).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
